title: Confidence-Aware Tool Orchestration for Robust Video Understanding
abstract: arXiv:2606.26904v1 Announce Type: cross  Abstract: Video reasoning language models implicitly assume that every input frame is equally reliable. This leads to what we term the Blind Trust Problem: under realistic perturbations such as motion blur, glare, or occlusion, frontier video reasoning models can suffer 15-30%p accuracy drops on real-world embodied benchmarks, while remaining unaware that their visual evidence has been degraded. To address this challenge, we propose Robust-TO, an agentic video understanding framework that explicitly integrates per-frame trustworthiness into every stage of reasoning. Robust-TO organizes heterogeneous visual perception tools under a unified evidence interface. Each tool receives a sub-query derived from the original question and a set of trustworthy frames selected by the reliability-relevance score. It returns evidence in a shared format: a concrete prediction (e.g., a bounding box, motion trajectory, recognized text, or action label), temporal g

translated_title: 面向鲁棒视频理解的置信感知工具编排
translated_abstract: arXiv:2606.26904v1 公告类型：交叉 摘要：视频推理语言模型隐含地假设每个输入帧的可靠性相同。这导致了我们所谓的“盲目信任问题”：在运动模糊、眩光或遮挡等现实扰动下，前沿的视频推理模型在真实世界具身基准测试中的准确率可能下降15-30个百分点，而模型本身却未意识到其视觉证据已经退化。为了解决这一挑战，我们提出了Robust-TO，一个智能体视频理解框架，它明确地将每帧的可信度整合到推理的每个阶段。Robust-TO在统一的证据接口下组织异构的视觉感知工具。每个工具接收一个从原始问题派生出的子查询以及一组由可靠性-相关性评分选择的可信帧，并以共享格式返回证据：一个具体的预测（例如，边界框、运动轨迹、识别文本或动作标签）以及时间信息。
tldr: 针对视频推理模型因盲目信任所有输入帧而导致的性能下降问题，提出了Robust-TO框架，通过显式整合每帧可信度并组织异构视觉工具，在统一证据接口下基于可靠性-相关性评分选择可信帧进行推理，从而显著提升在现实扰动下的鲁棒性。
en_tdlr: To address the performance degradation of video reasoning models caused by blindly trusting all input frames, we propose Robust-TO, which explicitly integrates per-frame trustworthiness and organizes heterogeneous visual tools to select trustworthy frames based on reliability-relevance scores for reasoning, thereby significantly enhancing robustness under real-world perturbations.
